## 5. CTA Variant A/B Test Evaluation Sheet

*Use this sheet to compare the three CTA variants generated by your Payoff Generator.*

| **Criterion** | **Variant 1** | **Variant 2** | **Variant 3** |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| **Continuity** – Does the CTA feel like a natural extension of the emotional resolution, not tacked on? | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No |
| **Callback** – Does it include a clear, unmistakable callback to the hook? | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No |
| **Voice** – Does it sound exactly like you, with no tonal drift? | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No |
| **Pacing** – Is the rhythm natural and effective? | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No | ☐ Yes ☐ No |
| **Overall preference?** (rank 1–3) | | | |
